footer.brand: Every product carries the handwriting of its heritage.
footer.newsletterDesc: Receive monthly dispatches from our regional scouts.
footer.newsletterSuccess: You're on the list — expect your first dispatch soon.

stories.metaDescription: Regional notes on specialties, terroir, and our producers—from Brittany to Tuscany. Discover Terravoa through the places behind our collection.
stories.title: Journal
stories.subtitle: Regional guides for people searching a place or a specialty—not travel lists. Terroir, what to notice on the label, and how to explore our producers and collection from there. Producer portraits (long reads about one maker) live on each producer’s page.
stories.noStoriesForRegion: No stories yet for this region — new pieces are published regularly.
stories.moreFromRegion: More producers, products, and stories from {region}.

reviews.intro: Star ratings and written reviews come from customers who bought this product through Terravoa. They reflect buyers’ experiences — not a score set or edited by Terravoa.
reviews.introModeration: We may remove content that is unlawful, abusive, fraudulent, or spam. We do not change star ratings for commercial reasons or to favour any producer.
reviews.formHint: Your rating is yours alone. Terravoa cannot alter your score after you submit an honest review.
reviews.emptyState: No reviews yet — be the first.
reviews.thankYouBody: Your review will appear after approval.

producerRatings.title: Reviews are from your customers — not from Terravoa
producerRatings.body: Product ratings are written by people who purchased through the marketplace. Terravoa does not assign those scores and cannot change them to favour anyone. We care about customer satisfaction: if feedback and fulfilment issues stay poor over time, we may need to adjust or end a listing — always in line with our agreement and with notice where required. Nothing here affects your statutory rights.

hero.title: Taste the Origin
hero.subtitle: An online shop for authentic food and drinks from European small producers. Browse olive oils, honeys, salts, charcuterie and more.
hero.tagline: — From Brittany's salt marshes to the Black Forest, from the Alps to the Atlantic coast. —
hero.imageAlt: Rustic table with artisan products overlooking Tuscan vineyards at golden hour

byCountry.title: Shop by Country
byCountry.subtitle: Pick a region you love and meet its makers — Tuscany, Brittany, the Black Forest and beyond.

giftSets.title: Gift Sets
giftSets.subtitle: Curated boxes for hosts, clients, and food lovers — carefully chosen for any occasion.

bestSellers.title: Best Sellers
bestSellers.subtitle: What our customers reach for first. The clearest answer to "just show me what works".

howItWorks.title: How Terravoa Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From producer to your door — without detours

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Browse curated products from Europe's finest small-batch producers.

order.title: Order Direct
order.description: Your order goes straight to the producer — no middlemen, no warehouses.

delivered.title: Delivered Fresh
delivered.description: Shipped directly from the source, carrying the soul of its origin.

origins.title: Verified Origins
origins.description: We visit every farm, workshop, and studio in person. No middle-men, just direct relationships with the makers.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Soul
sustainable.description: Prioritizing traditional farming and manufacturing methods that respect the local ecosystem and biodiversity.

fair.title: Fair Compensation
fair.description: Producers set their own prices. We ensure they receive the majority of the value, preserving rural livelihoods.

producerCTA.title: Sell your products across Europe
producerCTA.body: No online store needed. We handle payments, visibility, and the customer experience — you focus on your craft.
producerCTA.feature1: Direct access to 50,000+ curated buyers across Europe
producerCTA.feature2: No upfront costs — revenue share only

regionalArchives.title: Regional Archives
regionalArchives.subtitle: From the Atlantic coast to the heart of the continent

collectionPage.metaDescription: Browse our curated collection of artisan products, sourced directly from Europe's finest small-batch producers.
collectionPage.title: The Collection
collectionPage.subtitle: Every item in our collection has been personally sourced from verified European producers. Search, filter by region or category, or browse freely.
collectionPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by product, producer, or origin
collectionPage.noProductsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search term.

cookies.banner: We use essential cookies to keep the site running, and optional analytics cookies to understand how visitors use Terravoa. No data is sold to third parties.

seo.defaultDescription: Terravoa connects discerning customers with Europe's most authentic producers, offering products defined by origin, craftsmanship, and taste. Discover exceptional foods — carefully curated and delivered directly from the source.

aboutPage.heroImageAlt: The Terravoa table — olive oil, artisan cheese, honey, and fresh bread arranged against a Tuscan landscape.

customerAuth.emailConfirmed: Your email address is confirmed. You can sign in below.

producerApply.intro1: We collaborate with carefully selected producers across Europe who stand for authenticity, craftsmanship, and true origin.
producerApply.intro2: Please take a few minutes to tell us more about your products and your story.
producerApply.intro3: Every application is reviewed with care.

draft.restoredBody: Last saved {age} — you can pick up where you left off.
draft.autosaveNote: Your progress is saved automatically while you type.
draft.minutesAgo: {n, plural, =1 {1 minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
draft.hoursAgo: {n, plural, =1 {1 hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
draft.daysAgo: {n, plural, =1 {1 day ago} other {# days ago}}

step1.contactCompanyIntro: Please tell us who is completing this form (your name as the contact person) and the name of your company or brand as customers know it.
step1.fullNameHint: The individual submitting this application — we use this name when we reply about your application.
step1.businessNameHint: Legal or trading name under which you invoice — as it appears on official documents.
step1.businessNamePlaceholder: e.g. Hill Farm Dairy, Atelier du Midi
step1.companyRegistrationCountryHint: Where your legal entity is registered (commercial register or national equivalent). This may match your production country or differ if your seat is elsewhere.
step1.vatIdHint: EU VAT ID (e.g. DE123456789, FRXX999999999) or your national tax number used for B2B invoicing.
step1.productionLocationPlaceholder: A brief description of your production location
step1.desiredPlanHint: This helps us tailor the review. Final assignment is confirmed by admin.

step2.noAlcoholNote: Terravoa does not accept wine, beer, spirits, or any alcohol-based products. Please do not apply if your primary products contain alcohol.
step2.categoriesLabel: What type of products would you like to offer?
step2.descriptionHint: What makes them special? Mention key ingredients, origin, or tradition.
step2.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your products, ingredients, and what sets them apart...
step2.differentiatorHint: Your approach, tradition, or process that no one else has
step2.differentiatorPlaceholder: Tell us about your unique methods, traditions, or philosophy...
step2.pricingRangeLabel: Broad price range across your products
step2.pricingRangeHint: Optional — a typical band across your whole catalog, not per item. Type freely, the € symbol is shown for you.
step2.otherCategoryLabel: Tell us what to call your category
step2.otherCategoryHint: We'll review your suggestion and consider adding it to our list

step3.sectionSubtitle: This section helps us understand your production methods and any official certifications your products carry. There are no wrong answers — we value authenticity at every scale.
step3.organicNoNatural: No certification, but natural / low-input methods
step3.organicCertifierPlaceholder: e.g. Ecocert, CCPB, Bureau Veritas, Soil Association…
step3.certificationsHint: Select all that apply to your products

certifications.dop: DOP / PDO — Protected Designation of Origin

step3.certificationBodyHint: Optional — helps us verify your designations
step3.productionScaleLabel: How would you describe your production scale?
step3.productionScaleHint: We work with producers of all sizes — quality over quantity

productionScales.fullyArtisanal: Fully artisanal — every step done by hand, tiny batches
productionScales.traditional: Traditional with some equipment — methods are craft-based
productionScales.smallBusiness: Small family business — 2 to 10 people, seasonal or year-round

step3.annualProductionPlaceholder: e.g. 500 kg of honey, 2,000 jars of jam, 300 litres of olive oil
step3.annualProductionHint: Optional — helps us understand your capacity for fulfilment
step3.shelfLifeLabel: Typical shelf life of your products
step3.packagingLabel: Are your products packaged and ready for direct-to-customer shipment?
step3.packagingYes: Yes — already packaged for retail / direct sale
step3.packagingNo: Not yet — we would need to adapt our packaging

step4.storyHint: How did your production begin? Is there a tradition behind your work? What does your craft mean to you?
step4.storyPlaceholder: We'd love to hear about the history and heart behind what you do...
step4.glimpseSubtitle: Please upload authentic images — no catalog or stock photos.
step4.productPhotosUpload: Drag photos here or click to browse
step4.productionProcessUpload: Photos of your workshop, farm, or production
step4.environmentRegionUpload: Landscape, terroir, or place that defines your work
step4.uploadNote: Authentic images only — JPG, PNG, WebP up to 10MB each
step4.photosDraftWarning: Note: photo selections cannot be preserved if you leave this page — text answers are saved automatically.
step4.filesSelected: {n, plural, =1 {# photo selected} other {# photos selected}}
step4.onlinePresenceSubtitle: Share your website or social profiles so we can get to know you better.
step4.websiteHint: Your own website, farm page, or online shop
step4.otherLinksHint: Facebook, Etsy, local marketplace, press coverage — anything relevant
step4.otherLinksPlaceholder: URLs, one per line or separated by commas

step5.shippingCountries: Which countries do you currently ship to?
step5.shippingSpeed: How quickly can you ship orders after receiving them?
step5.shippingExperience: Do you have experience shipping directly to end customers?
step5.confirmNoAlcohol: I confirm that my application does not include wine, beer, spirits, or any other alcohol-based products.
step5.confirmLocal: I confirm that my products are locally produced and that I represent authentic, artisanal craftsmanship.
step5.confirmQuality: I agree to Terravoa's <link>quality standards</link> and understand that applications are subject to curation.
step5.confirmCompanyRegistered: I confirm we are a legally registered business in the country stated above, and the VAT / tax ID provided is valid for invoicing and cooperation with Terravoa.

success.title: Thank you for your application
success.body1: We carefully review every submission and will get back to you within the next few days.
success.body2: Terravoa is built on a curated selection — we appreciate your understanding that not all applications can be accepted.
success.body3: Selected producers will receive access to our partnership details and onboarding process.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Your product listings. New products require Terravoa approval before appearing on the public site.

newProduct.title: Add a product
newProduct.subtitle: Fill in the details below. Your listing will be reviewed by the Terravoa team before appearing in the collection — usually within 48 hours.

newProduct.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your product — its character, how it's made, what makes it special.

newProduct.imageHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF — up to 10 MB

profile.title: Public profile
profile.signedOutMessage: Sign in to see how your producer profile appears to customers.
profile.noProfileMessage: No producer profile is linked to this account yet. Contact Terravoa if you need access after approval.
profile.subtitle: Story, bio, and images shown on the Terravoa storefront. This is what customers see — not your partnership or commission terms.
profile.editIntro: Update how customers see your story on the marketplace. Name, slug, region, and images are managed by Terravoa.
profile.editNoteImages: To change your name, slug, region, or photos,

partnership.title: Partnership & payouts
partnership.subtitle: Membership and commission are not shown on the public website or in the customer checkout. This page is for producers only. Exact figures are configured via environment variables on the server and shown here once you are signed in (or when preview mode is enabled).
partnership.qualitativeBody: We offer two partnership tiers: one with a lower monthly membership and a higher commission on each sale, and one with a higher membership and a lower commission. Your personal rates are confirmed when your account is activated.
partnership.signInNote: Sign in with your producer account to see numbers, or set
partnership.earningsSubtitle: Stripe Connect will handle splits: Terravoa's commission, then net payout to your bank. This section will show revenue, deductions, and payout history.
partnership.noPayoutData: No sales yet. When customers buy your products, earnings and payout status will appear here.
partnership.payoutSignIn: Sign in with your producer account to view payout history.
partnership.planStarterDesc: Lower monthly membership, higher commission on each sale — ideal for small volumes and first listings.
partnership.planGrowthDesc: Higher membership, lower commission — designed for producers who scale volume on Terravoa.
partnership.stripeConnectBody: Automated splits and bank payouts require a connected Stripe account. Terravoa will link your account during onboarding.

shipping.title: Shipping settings
shipping.subtitle: Configure your shipping preferences. Customers see "shipped directly by {name}" — your internal settings stay here.
shipping.shippingCountriesDesc: Define which countries you ship to. Customers outside your coverage will see a notice at checkout.
shipping.handlingTimeDesc: How quickly you dispatch orders after receiving them. This is shown to customers as estimated delivery time.
shipping.packagingDesc: Terravoa encourages eco-friendly packaging. Fragile items should receive extra protection.
shipping.comingSoon: Editable shipping rules will be available once Stripe Connect is integrated.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: One secure payment — your products will be shipped directly by each producer. Shipping and billing details are collected on the next step.
checkout.multiProducer: Your order includes products from {count} producers. Items will be shipped in separate packages, fresh from each origin.
checkout.paymentsUnavailable: Payments are currently unavailable in this environment. You can still review your cart.
checkout.termsNotice: By continuing you agree to our <terms>terms</terms>. For questions, <contact>contact us</contact>.
checkout.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyMessage: Nothing here yet — explore the collection and add something wonderful.
cart.subtitle: Items ship directly from each producer. If you order from more than one maker, you may receive separate parcels.
cart.shippingNote: Shipping and taxes are calculated at checkout.

checkoutSuccess.title: Thank you
checkoutSuccess.confirmed: Your order is confirmed. Your products will be shipped directly by the producers — fresh from the origin, straight to your door.
checkoutSuccess.shippingUpdates: You'll receive shipping updates by email as each producer dispatches your items.

newsletterCTA.description: Exclusive offers, seasonal discoveries, and the stories behind the artisans who craft your food. No spam — just what matters.
newsletterCTA.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
newsletterCTA.privacy: Unsubscribe anytime. We respect your privacy.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.heroSubtitle: Seamless payment. Direct delivery from the source.
shipping.heroDescription: You pay once through Terravoa — securely and simply. Your products are then shipped directly by each producer, fresh from the origin.
shipping.directDesc: Every product is shipped directly by the producer — no warehouses, no middlemen. Your order travels straight from the origin to your door.
shipping.separateDesc: If you order from more than one producer, your items will arrive in separate packages. Each one is packed with care at its place of origin.
shipping.timesDesc: Most orders are dispatched within 1–3 business days of confirmed payment. Delivery within Europe typically takes 3–7 business days. Times vary by producer location and destination country.
shipping.areasDesc: We currently ship to all EU member states, Switzerland, Norway, and the United Kingdom. Additional countries may be available depending on the individual producer.
shipping.costsNote: Exact shipping costs vary by producer location and destination country. The final cost is shown at checkout before you confirm your order.
shipping.tempDesc1: Fresh, chilled, and frozen products require specialised packaging and carrier services to maintain the cold chain from producer to your door. Producers offering these products ship in insulated boxes with ice packs or dry ice, using express courier services that deliver within 24–48 hours of dispatch.
shipping.tempDesc2: Temperature-controlled products are typically dispatched at the beginning of the week (Monday–Wednesday) to avoid weekend delays. In exceptional heat conditions, dispatch may be postponed to protect product quality — we will notify you by email if this applies to your order.
shipping.tempDesc3: Due to the perishable nature of these products, an additional temperature-controlled delivery surcharge may apply. This will be clearly displayed at checkout.
shipping.trackingDesc1: Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive a shipping confirmation email containing a tracking number and a link to the carrier's tracking page. Tracking information may take up to 24 hours to become active after dispatch.
shipping.trackingDesc2: As orders are shipped directly by individual producers, each producer's package will have its own tracking number. If you have ordered from multiple producers, you will receive separate tracking emails for each shipment.
shipping.lostDesc1: If your parcel has not arrived within the estimated delivery window shown at checkout, please first check the tracking link provided in your shipping confirmation email.
shipping.lostDesc2: If tracking shows no movement for more than 5 business days, or if the estimated delivery date has passed without delivery, please contact us at {email} with your order number. We will liaise with the producer and carrier on your behalf to investigate and, where applicable, arrange a replacement shipment or full refund.
shipping.lostDesc3: Please note that Terravoa is not liable for delays caused by force majeure events, customs inspections, or circumstances beyond the carrier's reasonable control. However, we will always work to find a fair resolution.
shipping.paymentDesc1: One simple, central payment — credit card, Apple Pay, or Google Pay. All transactions are processed securely through Stripe. You pay once regardless of how many producers your order spans.
shipping.paymentDesc2: Your payment details are never stored on our servers. All prices include VAT for your country of delivery.

accountOrders.title: My Orders
accountOrders.subtitle: Your purchase history on Terravoa.
accountOrders.emptyDesc: Your purchases will appear here once you place your first order.

accountWishlist.title: My Wishlist
accountWishlist.subtitle: Items you've saved for later
accountWishlist.emptyDesc: Discover the collection and save your favourites for later.

returnRequest.title: Request a Return
returnRequest.intro: EU consumers have a 14-day right of withdrawal. Damaged or incorrect items can be returned at any time. We'll respond within 2 business days.
returnRequest.reasonWithdrawalDesc: I changed my mind within 14 days of receiving my order.
returnRequest.reasonDamagedDesc: The product was damaged or broken on arrival.
returnRequest.reasonWrongItemDesc: I received a different product from what I ordered.
returnRequest.reasonQualityDesc: The product did not meet the expected quality standards.
returnRequest.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us more about what happened…
returnRequest.successDesc: Your return request has been received. We'll review it and get back to you within 2 business days.
returnRequest.errorConnection: Could not connect. Please check your connection and try again.
returnRequest.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a producer, a customer, or simply curious — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.locationValue:
Based in Europe
Sourcing across the continent
contact.responseValue: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.
contact.successDesc: Thank you — we'll read your note carefully and reply as soon as we can, usually within one business day.

savoirFaire.title: Savoir-Faire
savoirFaire.intro: The French concept of "savoir-faire" — knowing how to do — captures what we look for in every producer: deep, practical knowledge passed down through generations. Here's how we find and verify them.
savoirFaire.step1Desc: We travel to regions across Europe, visiting local markets, talking to community leaders, and identifying producers who carry genuine traditional knowledge.
savoirFaire.step2Desc: Every producer is visited in person. We walk their fields, observe their methods, taste their products, and understand their story firsthand.
savoirFaire.step3Desc: We verify authenticity: no resellers, no mass production. Products must be made using traditional methods with locally sourced ingredients or materials.
savoirFaire.step4Desc: Accepted producers set their own prices and maintain full control of their production. We handle the platform, payments, and customer experience.
savoirFaire.ctaDesc: If you craft authentic, traditional products and want to reach customers who value quality and provenance, we'd love to hear your story.

regions.title: Origins
regions.subtitle: Every product begins somewhere. Explore the regions behind our producers — their terroir, traditions, and the culture that shapes what ends up in your kitchen.
